'''''UFC 308: Topuria vs. Holloway''''' was a mixed martial arts event produced by the [[Ultimate Fighting Championship]] that took place on October 26, 2024, at the [[Etihad Arena]] in [[Abu Dhabi]], United Arab Emirates.<ref name="AbuDhabi">{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2024/4/12/24128260/ufc-308-in-abu-dhabi-announced-for-oct-26|title=UFC 308 in Abu Dhabi announced for Oct. 26|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Alexander K. Lee|date=2024-04-12|access-date=2024-04-13}}</ref>

==Background==
The event marked the promotion's 20th visit to Abu Dhabi and first since [[UFC on ABC: Sandhagen vs. Nurmagomedov]] in August 2024.<ref name="AbuDhabi" />

A [[UFC Featherweight Championship]] bout between current champion [[Ilia Topuria]] and former champion [[Max Holloway]] headlined the event.<ref>{{Cite web|title=Ilia Topuria and Max Holloway meet in Abu Dhabi on October 26|url=https://www.marca.com/combates-ufc/2024/07/29/ilia-topuria-peleara-max-holloway-abu-dhabi-proximo-26-octubre.html|date=2024-07-30|access-date=2024-07-30|publisher=marca.com|author=Irati Prat}} {{in lang|es}}</ref><ref name="maxilia">{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2024/08/ufc-308-news-ilia-topuria-vs-max-holloway-featherweight-title-fight-headlines-abu-dhabi|title=Ilia Topuria vs. Max Holloway title fight headlines UFC 308 in Abu Dhabi|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Josh Evanoff|date=2024-08-03|access-date=2024-08-03}}</ref> [[Diego Lopes (fighter)|Diego Lopes]] served as backup and potential replacement for this fight.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2024/9/27/24256411/diego-lopes-to-serve-as-backup-fighter-for-ufc-308|title=Diego Lopes to serve as backup fighter for UFC 308 title fight between Ilia Topuria and Max Holloway|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Jed Meshew|date=2024-09-27|access-date=2024-09-27}}</ref>

A five-round middleweight bout between former [[UFC Middleweight Championship|UFC Middleweight Champion]] (also [[The Ultimate Fighter: The Smashes]] welterweight winner) [[Robert Whittaker (fighter)|Robert Whittaker]] and [[Khamzat Chimaev]] took place at the event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2024/08/ufc-308-news-khamzat-chimaev-vs-robert-whittaker-booked-again-abu-dhabi|title=UFC books Khamzat Chimaev vs. Robert Whittaker again for UFC 308 in Abu Dhabi|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Mike Bohn|date=2024-08-03|access-date=2024-08-03}}</ref> They were previously expected to headline [[UFC on ABC: Whittaker vs. Aliskerov]] last June, but Chimaev withdrew due to illness.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2024/06/ufc-saudi-arabia-khamzat-chimaev-out-robert-whittaker-vs-ikram-aliskerov-set-new-abc-6-headliner|title=Khamzat Chimaev out; Robert Whittaker vs. Ikram Aliskerov set as new UFC on ABC 6 headliner|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Mike Bohn|date=2024-06-13|access-date=2024-08-03}}</ref>

A heavyweight rematch between former interim [[UFC Heavyweight Championship|UFC Heavyweight Champion]] [[Ciryl Gane]] and former [[List of Bellator MMA champions#Heavyweight World Championship|Bellator Heavyweight World Champion]] [[Alexander Volkov (fighter)|Alexander Volkov]] was expected to take place at the event.<ref>{{Cite web|title=UFC books Ciryl Gane vs Alexander Volkov to Abu Dhabi card in October|url=https://agfight.com/ufc/ufc-encaminha-ciryl-gane-vs-alexander-volkov-para-card-de-abu-dhabi-em-outubro/|date=2024-07-12|access-date=2024-07-12|publisher=agfight.com|author=Diego Ribas}} {{in lang|es}}</ref> The pairing previously headlined [[UFC Fight Night: Gane vs. Volkov]] in June 2021 which Gane won by unanimous decision.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.espn.com/mma/story/_/id/31715147/ciryl-gane-defeats-alexander-volkov-via-unanimous-decision-says-ready-shot-heavyweight-belt|title=Ciryl Gane defeats Alexander Volkov via unanimous decision, says he's 'ready' for shot at heavyweight belt|work=espn.com|author=Marc Raimondi|date=2024-06-13|access-date=2024-08-03}}</ref> However, the bout was moved to [[UFC 310]] due to Volkov's knee injury.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/2024/09/ufc-308-news-alexander-volkov-injury-vs-ciryl-gane-rematch-310-las-vegas-abu-dhabi|title=Report: Alexander Volkov injury pushes Ciryl Gane rematch from UFC 308 to UFC 310|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Staff|date=2024-09-22|access-date=2024-09-22}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.sherdog.com/news/news/Alexander-Volkov-Suffers-Knee-Injury-Withdraws-from-UFC-308-Rematch-vs-Ciryl-Gane-195041|title=Alexander Volkov Suffers Knee Injury, Withdraws from UFC 308 Rematch vs. Ciryl Gane|publisher=sherdog.com|author=Tristen Critchfield|date=2024-09-24|access-date=2024-09-24}}</ref>

A heavyweight bout between [[Marcos Rogério de Lima]] and [[Kennedy Nzechukwu]] was scheduled for this event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.sherdog.com/news/news/Marcos-Rogerio-de-Lima-to-Face-Kennedy-Nzechukwu-at-UFC-308-on-Oct-26-194535|title=Marcos Rogerio de Lima to Face Kennedy Nzechukwu at UFC 308 on Oct. 26|author=Sayan Nag|publisher=sherdog.com|date=2024-08-03|access-date=2024-08-03}}</ref> However, Lima withdrew from the fight for unknown reasons and was replaced by [[Justin Tafa]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.nzherald.co.nz/sport/ufc/ufc-308-justin-tafa-books-ufc-return-against-kennedy-nzechukwu-in-abu-dhabi/CSGGLI37JBBXLFH6DTERGHSB3A/|title=UFC 308: Justin Tafa books UFC return against Kennedy Nzechukwu in Abu Dhabi|author=Christopher Reive|publisher=nzherald.co.nz|date=2024-09-12|access-date=2024-09-12}}</ref> Subsequently, Tafa withdrew from the bout due to an injury and was replaced by [[Chris Barnett]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://cagesidepress.com/2024/10/12/chris-barnett-gets-new-booking-faces-kennedy-nzechukwu-at-ufc-308/|title=Chris Barnett Gets New Booking, Faces Kennedy Nzechukwu at UFC 308|publisher=cagesidepress.com|author=Staff|date=2024-10-12|access-date=2024-10-12}}</ref>

A welterweight bout between [[Rinat Fakhretdinov]] and [[Nursulton Ruziboev]] was scheduled for this event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2024/7/24/24204174/morning-report-kamaru-usman-targets-winner-leon-edwards-belal-muhammad-still-got-tread-left-in-tires|title=Morning Report: Kamaru Usman targets winner of UFC 304 main event: 'I still got tread left in these tires' - Fight Announcements|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Drake Riggs|date=2024-07-24|access-date=2024-07-24}}</ref> However, Ruziboev withdrew from the fight due to an injury and was replaced by former [[Legacy_Fighting_Alliance#LFA_Welterweight_Championship|LFA Welterweight Champion]] and promotional newcomer Carlos Leal.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.sherdog.com/news/news/PFL-Veteran-Carlos-Leal-Steps-in-to-Face-Rinat-Fakhretdinov-at-UFC-308-195270|title=PFL Veteran Carlos Leal Steps in to Face Rinat Fakhretdinov at UFC 308|publisher=sherdog.com|author=Tristen Critchfield|date=2024-10-20|access-date=2024-10-21}}</ref>

A bantamweight bout between [[Said Nurmagomedov]] and Daniel Santos was scheduled for this event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.sherdog.com/news/news/UFC-308-Update-Said-Nurmagomedov-vs-Daniel-Santos-Set-for-Abu-Dhabi-194999|title=UFC 308 Update: Said Nurmagomedov vs. Daniel Santos Set for Abu Dhabi|publisher=sherdog.com|author=Tristen Critchfield|date=2024-09-18|access-date=2024-10-21}}</ref> However, one week before the event, Santos withdrew from the fight for unknown reasons and the bout was subsequently cancelled.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.si.com/fannation/mma/news/ufc-308-report-top-prospect-pulled-from-undercard|title=UFC 308 Report: Top Prospect Pulled from Undercard|publisher=si.com|author=Mathew Riddle|date=2024-10-21|access-date=2024-10-21}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2024/10/23/24277618/said-nurmagomedov-vs-daniel-santos-officially-off-ufc-308|title=Said Nurmagomedov vs. Daniel Santos officially off UFC 308|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Alexander K. Lee|date=2024-10-23|access-date=2024-10-23}}</ref>

At the weigh-ins, a lightweight bout between [[Mateusz Rębecki]] and [[Myktybek Orolbai]] was changed to a 160 pounds catchweight bout.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/2024/10/25/24279168/ufc-308-weigh-in-results-ilia-topuria-max-holloway-on-point-khamzat-chimaev-cuts-it-close|title=UFC 308 weigh-in results: Ilia Topuria, Max Holloway on point, Khamzat Chimaev cuts it close|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Alexander K. Lee|date=2024-10-25|access-date=2024-10-25}}</ref> In addition, at the weigh-ins, the originally contracted bantamweight bout between [[Farid Basharat]] and Victor Hugo was changed to a featherweight bout after Hugo weighed in at 145.5 pounds, 9.5 pounds over the bantamweight non-title fight limit; although Basharat weighed in at 137 pounds, he agreed to allow the fight to take place at featherweight.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmamania.com/2024/10/25/24279334/wtf-ufc-308-fighter-heavy-double-digits-opponent-forced-change-weight-classes-keep-bout-intact-mma|title=WTF?! UFC 308 fighter heavy by double digits, opponent forced to change weight classes to keep bout intact|publisher=mmamania.com|author=Jesse Holland|date=2024-10-25|access-date=2024-10-25}}</ref>

== Bonus awards ==
The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.bjpenn.com/mma-news/ufc-308/ufc-308-bonus-report-ilia-topuria-one-of-five-fighters-to-take-home-an-extra-50k/|title=UFC 308 Bonus Report: Ilia Topuria one of five fighters to take home an extra $50k|publisher=bjpenn.com|author=Chris Taylor|date=2024-10-26|access-date=2024-10-26}}</ref>
*'''Fight of the Night: Mateusz Rębecki vs. Myktybek Orolbai'''
*'''Performance of the Night: Ilia Topuria, Khamzat Chimaev''' and '''Sharabutdin Magomedov'''
